description: Default capability for CTRL windows. Core invoke + window/event/menu/tray APIs and PWA plugins. NOTE: core:window:allow-start-dragging is listed explicitly because it is NOT part of core:window:default — without it the decorationless window's data-tauri-drag-region handle (StatusBar) silently no-ops and the window cannot be moved. Do not remove it. BYOK keychain access lives in a SEPARATE capability (see keychain.json) so it can be gated independently once WASM mcps land — they must NOT inherit BYOK reach via this default scope.
